dialog.text: Hold it! My PDA just flagged you for taking shots at us—possible traitor alert. If you don't want the squad to open fire, pay up for medical expenses or prove you're not a threat!

option.text: It was a mistake, alright? Take the money, cancel the alert on the PDA.

Broke? Typical. Then you'll take a forced timed task for me and my squad. Refuse, fail, or try to run, and I'll send the radio go-ahead for immediate execution, destroying your reputation with us. Are you in?
Forget it. I'd rather settle this the hard way.
